# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.

Prevent envoy admin interface exposed.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin_address: "0.0.0.0" # Change to your IP or hostname if you want it publicly accessible, leave as 0.0.0.0 for any available address on the machine where Envoy is running (default)
port: <your-envoy-proxy-admin-interface-port>   # Port number that envoy should listen to admin interface requests from clients such as tools like Kiali, Istio etc., default 15000. Change it if you want a different port for the Admin Interface
access_log: "/dev/stdout"    # Path where access logs will be written (default is /dev/stdout) change to your desired path or filename and format, e.g.: '/path/to/yourfile' 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/envoy-access.log
stats_endpoints: "/prometheus"    # Path where stats endpoints will be exposed (default is http://localhost:9000) change to your desired path or filename and format, e.g.: '/path/to' 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/envoy-stats.log
